name: Lochmoor Club
address: 1018 Sunningdale Dr, Grosse Pointe Woods, MI 48236
about: Lochmoor Club is a century-old, family-oriented country club located in Grosse Pointe Woods. The venue features a meticulously maintained 18-hole championship golf course and provides a variety of amenities including tennis, pickleball, swimming, fitness facilities, and dining options. It offers a traditional country club experience with a focus on family activities, social events, and a welcoming atmosphere for members and their guests. The club also boasts a four-season retreat with indoor facilities including TrackMan simulators for year-round practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to TrackMan simulators in the Indoor Golf Center
Meticulously maintained 18-hole championship course with rich history
Comprehensive golf program including lessons, leagues, and caddie services
Family-friendly environment with numerous amenities beyond golf

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available in the clubhouse, including casual lunches at the Halfway House
Full bar service available including the Patio Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Located in the Lochmoor Athletic Center (LAC) for year-round practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs for play on the course and in simulators. The club's pro shop is stocked with high-end equipment, apparel, and accessories for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted. The club offers full dining and bar service, including the Halfway House for casual lunches and the Patio Bar for beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The club maintains a standard pace of play of 4 hours for 18 holes. Players are expected to keep pace with the group ahead and ensure guests maintain appropriate speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Lochmoor Club is very family-friendly with numerous amenities for children including junior golf programs, a championship swim team, tennis/pickleball courts, and a welcoming social atmosphere.
